name: bazarr
description: Check wanted/missing subtitles for movies and series, list providers, and trigger subtitle searches in Bazarr via its REST API. Skills-only, no MCP server required.

interface.longDescription: Check wanted/missing subtitles for movies and series, list providers, and trigger subtitle searches in Bazarr via its REST API. Skills-only, no MCP server required.
defaultPrompt: What subtitles are missing in Bazarr?
Search subtitles for a movie in Bazarr.
